tasks.title: Create ComplaintSlaService
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN category with configured SLA WHEN calculateDeadline called THEN returns deadline
GIVEN unconfigured category WHEN calculateDeadline called THEN returns null
GIVEN complaint with past deadline WHEN isOverdue called THEN returns true

tasks.title: Create ComplaintSlaJob background job
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN open complaints with overdue SLA WHEN job runs THEN overdue complaints are logged
GIVEN no overdue complaints WHEN job runs THEN no warnings logged

tasks.title: Unit tests for ComplaintSlaService
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN test class WHEN phpunit runs THEN 3+ test methods pass

tasks.title: Unit tests for ComplaintSlaJob
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN test class WHEN phpunit runs THEN 2+ test methods pass

tasks.title: Verify client detail complaints section
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN client with complaints WHEN viewing client detail THEN complaints section visible
GIVEN client detail WHEN clicking Register complaint THEN form opens with pre-linked client
